name: Janet's Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the margarine, shortening, brown sugar, and white sugar until smooth.
2. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the vanilla.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, mixing well after each addition.
5. Stir in the chocolate chips.
6. Shape dough into cookies about 1-inch wide and place on ungreased baking sheets.
7. Bake at 350°F for 10-12 minutes or until lightly browned and slightly underdone.
